title: ItzAxrush PvP – 200 FPS Pack 🔥
description:
ItzAxrush PvP – 200 FPS Pack
Clean PvP pack for high FPS and smooth gameplay.
Low fire, short swords, clean GUI, reduced particles.
v0.4 (Latest Release)
Made by ItzAxrush
body:
A clean and optimized PvP resource pack designed to give you smooth gameplay, better visibility, and improved performance. This pack is built for Bedwars players who want a simple, distraction-free experience while keeping everything clear during fights.

Whether you’re rushing, clutching, or taking intense PvP fights, this pack helps you stay focused and consistent.

⚡ Features:

Custom hunger icons 🍗
Edited TNT texture 💣
Low fire for better visibility 🔥
Short swords for cleaner PvP ⚔️
Clean and simple GUI 🟪
Reduced particles for higher FPS 🚀
Smooth and minimal textures

🎮 Designed for:
Bedwars, Skywars, and all competitive PvP modes where visibility and performance matter.

📦 Version: v0.4 (Latest Release)
🛠 Made by: ItzAxrush PvP

⭐ Follow for more high-performance PvP packs!
